name: X-OSINT — OSINT framework import
description: Imports the output of X-OSINT (github.com/TermuxHackz/X-osint, a Termux/Linux OSINT framework — phone/email/username/domain intelligence, VIN OSINT, reverse phone/email, subdomain enumeration, email-from-name) into XORCISM's threat-intel exchange (XTHREAT.INTELEXCHANGE via runner.import_threat_intel). Parses either an X-OSINT case JSON ({target, kind, results:[{module,type,value,source}]}) or the raw console text of a run (observables are extracted with regex). Each discovered observable (email, subdomain, host, phone, account, URL) becomes an INTELEXCHANGE intel item (value as reference, X-OSINT module carried in tags). The native /cti-expert cockpit maps OSINT techniques (VIN / email-from-name) to this connector. Offline: pass `file`, or run with no config for the bundled sample.

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: The subject the X-OSINT run was about (phone / email / username / domain) — used to label the imported intel when the file does not carry it.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: A saved X-OSINT case JSON or raw console-output text file to parse
